TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Fernando_Chui_Sai_On, title = Fernando_Chui_Sai_On, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fernando_Chui_Sai_On} }

S.FORM: Fernando Chui Sai On I 1957 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 13 a romi'ad masofoc ci Fernando Chui Sai On, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Macau anini i ci Fernando Chui Sai On, patirengan a romi'ad i 2009 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 20 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: f…ôrnan…¨~…ģo~u ¶ńßo~u~ui sai o~un i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i f…ôrnan…¨~…ģo~u ¶ńßo~u~ui sai o~un, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ma ¶ao~u~u anini i ¶i f…ôrnan…¨~…ģo~u ¶ńßo~u~ui sai o~un, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Fernando Chui Sai On I 1957 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 13 a romi'ad masofoc ci Fernando Chui Sai On, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Macau anini i ci Fernando Chui Sai On, patirengan a romi'ad i 2009 a miheca saka 12 folad saka 20 a romi'ad.
